meaning: n.平版(指石版或金属板)印刷,平版画vt.以平版印刷
examples: The dance caught the eye of artist Henri de Toulouse-Lautrec, who depicted it in a lithograph.
Within the framework this technical process is planned to use 193 nm immersion lithograph.
It is an new technology to use synchrotron radiation lithograph for making large scale integral circuit.
Prize: Archers who hit a bullseye will win a limited edition Tomb Raider lithograph.
One, a color lithograph by an unknown artist, shows Jones winning the British Amateur tournament in 1930.
